revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 8일]][[wuu:腊月初八]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初八]][[zh:十二月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 8|qq=December 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sushun|en|Emperor Sushun|qid=Q349238|lt=Emperor Sushun|1=Emperor Sushun}} 5 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|593|en|593|qid=Q33889|lt=593|1=593}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}} ) - {{ill|Princess Nukatabe|ja|額田部皇女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Nukatabe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 推古天皇|1=Empress Suiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q298057}} , consort of {{ill|Emperor Bidatsu|en|Emperor Bidatsu|qid=Q316637|lt=Emperor Bidatsu|1=Emperor Bidatsu}} , ascended the throne as Japan's first empress, becoming {{ill|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q298057}} , the 33rd ruler of Japan. * {{ill|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|en|Jōwa (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1146143|lt=Jōwa|1=Jōwa (Muromachi period)}} 2 / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 1 (Julian calendar {{ill|1347|en|1347|qid=Q6082|lt=1347|1=1347}} {{ill|January 20|en|January 20|qid=Q2267|lt=January 20|1=January 20}} ) - The {{ill|Southern Court|en|Southern Court|qid=Q3001082|lt=Southern Court (Japan)|1=Southern Court}} changed the era name from {{ill|Kōkoku|en|Kōkoku|qid=Q1143592|lt=Kōkoku|1=Kōkoku}} to Shōhei. * [[Bunroku]]{{efn|Period of Japanese history (1592–1596)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bunroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1593|en|1593|qid=Q6772|lt=1593|1=1593}} {{ill|January 10|en|January 10|qid=Q2243|lt=January 10|1=January 10}} ) - The era name was changed from {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} to Bunroku due to the ascension of {{ill|Emperor Go-Yōzei|en|Emperor Go-Yōzei|qid=Q349440|lt=Emperor Go-Yōzei|1=Emperor Go-Yōzei}} . * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}} ) - The first Japanese-language daily newspaper, {{ill|Yokohama Mainichi Shimbun|ja|横浜毎日新聞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokohama Mainichi Shimbun|1=Yokohama Mainichi Shimbun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11543205}} , was published in Yokohama. == Births == * {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|qid=Q1145295|lt=Manji (era)|1=Manji (era)}} 1 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1658|en|1658|qid=Q6991|lt=1658|1=1658}} {{ill|December 31|en|December 31|qid=Q2912|lt=December 31|1=December 31}} ) - {{ill|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|en|Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|qid=Q846911|lt=Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu|1=Yanagisawa Yoshiyasu}} , {{ill|Fudai daimyō|en|Fudai daimyō|qid=Q643640|lt=Fudai daimyō|1=Fudai daimyō}} (+ {{ill|1714|en|1714|qid=Q6878|lt=1714|1=1714}} ). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 19 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1735|en|1735|qid=Q6984|lt=1735|1=1735}} {{ill|January 1|en|January 1|qid=Q2150|lt=January 1|1=January 1}} ) - {{ill|Minagawa Kien|ja|皆川淇園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minagawa Kien|1=Ki-en|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3196280}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1807|en|1807|qid=Q6909|lt=1807|1=1807}} ). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 8 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1826|en|1826|qid=Q7004|lt=1826|1=1826}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}} ) - {{ill|Mitsukuri Shūhei|ja|箕作秋坪|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsukuri Shūhei|1=Mitsukuri Shūhei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6532071}} , {{ill|Rangaku scholar|ja|Rangaku Scholar|1=Rangaku scholar|2=ja|3=蘭学者|qid=Q11625245|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rangaku scholar|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11625245}} (+ {{ill|1886|en|1886|qid=Q7822|lt=1886|1=1886}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 3 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}} ) - {{ill|Kuraba Tomisaburō|ja|倉場富三郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuraba Tomisaburō|1=Tomisaburo Awajiya Glover|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11386608}} , {{ill|Businessman|ja|Businessperson|1=Businessperson|2=ja|3=実業家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Businessman|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43845}} (+ {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Buretsu|en|Emperor Buretsu|qid=Q334644|lt=Emperor Buretsu|1=Emperor Buretsu}} 8 (Julian calendar {{ill|507|en|507|qid=Q32917|lt=507|1=507}} {{ill|January 7|en|January 7|qid=Q2228|lt=January 7|1=January 7}} ) - {{ill|Emperor Buretsu|en|Emperor Buretsu|qid=Q334644|lt=Emperor Buretsu|1=Emperor Buretsu}} , the 25th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} . == Commemorations == * {{ill|Laba Festival|en|Laba Festival|qid=Q2086945|lt=Laba Festival|1=Laba Festival}} ({{CHN|qq=}} ) * {{ill|Muchi|en|Muchi|qid=Q11343229|lt=Mūchī (Okinawan Festival)|1=Muchi}} * {{ill|Bodhi Day|en|Bodhi Day|qid=Q400077|lt=Jōdō-e|1=Bodhi Day}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|7|12|9|11|8|1|12|1208|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
